project_scope.goal: Redesign LEXA Lifestyle homepage for a World-Class, Minimal, Luxury aesthetic.
constraints: Significantly REDUCE content - Minimalism is key.
Fix consistent widths (No awkward narrow containers vs full-screen sections).
Maintain 'Hero Video' functionality from Site Settings.
Use existing components where possible but styled for the new premium look.

layout_rules.container_strategy: Use a consistent 'Wide Container' (max-w-[1600px]) for all content sections. Allow Hero and Marquees to be 100% width (w-full).
layout_rules.grid_system: Use CSS Grid (Bento style) for feature showcases. Avoid simple single-column stacks on desktop.
layout_rules.alignment: Left-align text for readability, Center-align only for 'Statement' sections.

effects.gradients: Subtle radial gradients for depth (e.g., radial-gradient(circle at center, #1a1a1a 0%, #000000 100%)). NO linear primary color gradients.

page_structure.specs: Full viewport height (h-screen). Background Video. Minimal text overlay (Headline + Subheadline + Primary CTA). No clutter.
Full-width sliding marquee. Monochrome logos (opacity 50% -> 100% on hover). Minimal vertical height.
Large Typography Statement. 'The Invisible Technology'. Split layout: Text Left, Abstract/Detail Image Right.
page_structure.content: Luxury Home Automation tailored for Dubai's elite.

page_structure.specs: 3-4 Key Projects only. Large imagery. Minimal text. Link to Case Studies. Use a horizontal scroll or wide grid.
3-Item Grid: Lighting, Security, Entertainment. Dark cards, subtle gold hover effects.
Simple, elegant background. Heading: 'Ready to Transform Your Home?'. Primary Action: 'Book Consultation'.
Existing Footer, ensure dark mode compatibility.

implementation_steps.action: Analyze current `page.tsx` and identify components to keep vs. discard.

implementation_steps.details: Ensure the main page wrapper allows full width. Remove any `container` class from the `layout.tsx` or `page.tsx` root if it constrains the whole page.
Implement the simplified structure defined in 'page_structure'. Use `max-w-[1600px]` wrappers for content sections.
Apply the 'Dark Luxury' color palette. Ensure Gold accents (#C9A962) are used sparingly for emphasis only.

image_strategy.icons: Minimalist line icons (Lucide React or Phosphor), Gold color.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Use 'Outfit' for headings.
Avoid 'vibrating' colors. Stick to deep blacks and gold.
